title: Roadmap: hash-cover relation links between wiki pages (close the dec_c205c26472 residual)
context: Accepted residual from the e2e audit: relation links use slugById, which is not part of any page hash — a slug reassignment (new same-name component) can leave a fresh page linking to a renamed sibling until its own inputs move.
decision: Fold each page's resolved relation slugs into its freshness hash (two-pass wikiStatus: slugs first, packs second) so a sibling rename re-renders every page that links to it.
